text: - 9.3 WARRANTY PERIOD: Subcontractor shall guarantee all workmanship and materials against defects for a period of one (1) year from Owner's final acceptance of the Project, however, manufacturer's warranty on products used which have a warranty of more than one (1) year shall remain in full effect for the stated duration of warranty period and shall be fully transferable. All repairs or defects in workmanship or replacement of materials within that period of time shall be at the expense of Subcontractor, both labor and/or materials replacement.
